title: Monday.com expert
excerpt: Hi, I am looking to possibly hire someone to get our CRM up and running properly.  We not only want it to include standard sales crm but also to include (to a degree) numerous additional stages in respect to project mana…

posts.author: GARYWEINBERG (Gary)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I am looking to possibly hire someone to get our CRM up and running properly. We not only want it to include standard sales crm but also to include (to a degree) numerous additional stages in respect to project management flow as well as potentially ongoing communication following completion. We have pretty much everything set that we’d like done, just don’t have the time ourselves to do it and would like to potentially hire someone to do it.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Garry!

Have you checked out our experts catalogue?.

Tomorrow we are having an intimate sales CRM deep dive sessions, it is a great opportunity to ask your CRM questions and learn about the most impactful features! It will be hosted by Sasha from the monday.com sales CRM team! More info here.

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @GARYWEINBERG

Welcome to the community! You are in the right place to find someone! My name is Elena and I’m the founder of Kick Consulting, Australia channel partner of monday.com. we’ve worked with monday.com for over 5 years and have a team of 9 working along side of me (project/change managers, implementation specialists, developers).

monday.com CRM is one of our specialties, we have a vast number of clients using it. We offer a complimentary 1-hour initial meeting to discuss your pinpoints, needs and option. You can book a session through this link.

If you are unable to find suitable time, please let myself know and I will contact you with more availability.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Elena
Kick Consulting

posts.author: MondayMex (Gabriel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Gary,

Happy to help. We are certified Monday partner based in Mexico, with ana amazing bilingual staff thats has helped over 250 monday customers. Please feel free to send an email a; info@cinapsys.com so we can understand your requirements and help you build efficent processes on monday.

posts.author: CarbonJon (Jon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Gary!

Welcome to the monday community forums. My team here at CarbonWeb has a few different CRM building options that we would love to show you. We even have a completely free project management solution that can tie right into any CRM for seamless connectivity throughout your entire account.

Book a time with us here to learn more!

If you have any questions at all please feel free to message me on here.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @GARYWEINBERG

We’re a dedicated monday.com consulting partner with years of experience in the platform and have a team of skilled project/change managers, developers, and implementation specialists.

One of our specialties is monday CRM implementation, we have a vast number of clients using it. We also offer a 1-hour complimentary initial meeting to discuss your requirements and options. This helps us to construct a personalized CRM solution for your business. You can provide your details in this link.

I look forward to hearing from you.
